scripts.build: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run-many -t build
scripts.check: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-fast
scripts.generate: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run joern-effect:generate
scripts.check-generated: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run joern-effect:check-generated
scripts.lint: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run-many -t lint --all
scripts.property: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run joern-effect-properties:property
scripts.property:joern: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run joern-effect-properties:property-joern
scripts.codex:check: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-fast
scripts.codex:cloud-check: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-fast
scripts.arch:scan: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:arch:scan
scripts.arch:mutation: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:arch:mutation
scripts.source-bom:check: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:source-bom-check
scripts.policy:commit: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-commit
scripts.policy:push: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-push
scripts.policy:all: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-all
